post_text:
Can someone remind me when abstract submissions for the next NICAR open? Every year I think I should submit a talk, and every year I forget. 🙃

#NICAR26

On the road to #nicar26. Chilling out now watching Red Sox-Yankees (alternating with checking FlightAware to see how much my trip from LGA might be delayed).  Looking forward to catching up with old and new friends and seeing how AI is affecting your work for better or worse.

Here, we’ll share even more stories, methodologies, datasets we're looking at, tools we like, and the occasional rant about color-coded spreadsheets.

A bunch of us are at NICAR next week, so expect some live threads from sessions and hallway dispatches. If you're going, come find us! #NICAR26

On my way to #NICAR26!

I’m looking forward to learning about leveraging emerging AI capabilities to support public interest values.

www.ire.org/training/con...

If you are at #nicar26 in Indy, come by my session tomorrow morning, "AI Tools That Won't Get You Fired"

We'll break all kinds of stuff ...
Will you be attending #NICAR26? MuckRock staff will be hosting sessions throughout the weekend. Check out the upcoming panels in this thread and say hi! 👋
Headed to Indianapolis for NICAR!
It is so incredibly early. You better be worth it, #NICAR26.

If you are at #nicar26 in Indy, come by my session tomorrow morning, "AI Tools That Won't Get You Fired".

We'll break all kinds of stuff ...

I will be at #NICAR26 this week teaching classes! 

For campaign finance folks: come to my Thursday 11:30am class on libfec, a new fast CLI tool for working with FEC data! 

Also get limited-edition libfec stickers + a campfin "zine"!

(Bonus: find @simonwillison.net and I for Datasette stickers)

On Thursday I’ll be on a panel at #NICAR26 to talk about how I used FOIA to obtain records from municipal agencies that shed light on federal immigration raids, as well as the collaboration of Chicago journos that used OSINT to investigate feds’ use of tear gas. (Stories in thread)

Heading to #NICAR26 on Thursday! Looking forward to sharing some knowledge, learning a new stuff and getting recharged and reinspired. Want to talk tools, process, public media (or whatever)? Come find me! Also made a bunch of these for anyone who wants one.

Taking off for #NICAR26 in Indy soon! Come find me if you want to talk about frontend tech, data graphics, design systems, CMS hopes and dreams...

Also, I spun up a music festival grid-styled look at the schedule, if this is helpful for anyone besides me: www.tylermachado.com/nicar-schedu...

author_display_name: Reporters Committee for Freedom of the Press

post_text: If you'll be around on Sunday morning there's a NICAR-L session where we can explore this!

And if you need more incentive to go to this session, yes, we'll be providing some kind of goodies. 

That's all I'm saying.

#NICAR26 #Accessibility #AltText

schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

Really looking forward to attending this week’s @ire.org NICAR conference in Indianapolis! 🏎️🏁

I’ll be doing a panel with Libby Seline and Ryan Serpico where we dive into some of the AI concepts that journalists should know, and share some tips for reporting on AI. 
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

This is a great way to make sure your social posts are accessible! And if you don’t know how to write alt text, join @stacykess.bsky.social and I for our “Implementing Accessibility” session at #NICAR26 on Friday!

Can data storytelling reach audiences who distrust established science? 

In this #NICAR26 session, panelists share innovative approaches to presenting data in ways that engage, persuade and build trust.

With: Eva Constantaras, Aaron Mendelson, Max Siegelbaum, Ariana Beedie

Attend the "State secrets: a workflow for using state-level ethics disclosure data in your reporting" session at #NICAR26.  

Journalists Audrey Nielsen and Diara Townes will demo two states’ systems, share collaborative datasets + a 2026 tipsheet.

This week, @ire.org has its annual NICAR conference. If you struggle to remember to add alt text to your images, Bluesky has a setting that will remind you. Go to "Settings," then "Accessibility." Select the checkbox for "Require alt text before posting."

#NICAR26 #NICAR2026

If you're coming to #NICAR2026 this week, I've got a few sessions for you:

* Demoing the new IRE Resources Center with @palewi.re (Thu)
* Using LLMs to improve your archives (Sat)
* Tips for election coverage (Sat)

Will also be at the NICAR-L session on Sunday morning with some work.

Come along!

For fun (I'm retired 😅) I worked with Claude to do this in R to also get an RSS feed. Data currently updates  hourly but I'll try to ⬆️ frequency during #NICAR26.
Web page: smach.github.io/nicar-bluesk...
RSS feed: raw.githubusercontent.com/smach/nicar-...
R code: github.com/smach/nicar-...
Busy week: I'll be speaking at the CMA conference in NYC on Wednesday morning and #NICAR26 in Indianapolis on Thursday morning. If you're at either conference, stop by and say  hello.
Hmu if you’re going to NICAR this year

I'm moderating a panel at NICAR this week! Come hear @allanlasser.com, @elizabethrenter.bsky.social, @arlenemartinez.bsky.social and I talk about careers and finding your niche in news or news-adjacent roles. Stop by, say hi and bring your questions! schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...
If you are in Indy and want to learn about a really nifty data cleaning tool OpenRefine, take my hands-on #NICAR26 session on Saturday morning! schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

I'm headed to #NICAR26 this week with a bunch of @innovationut.bsky.social students so we can learn about more tools and stories to tell using data and other tech. So ... I may do more posting than ... well, almost none. We gonna get nerdy.

SOME PERSONAL NEWS: I’m on the journalism job market again! (More below)

From business, ed, legal, breaking & investigative reporting, to data & research skills rooted in Python, R & AI — I can deliver for your newsroom. Email me at danbauman77@gmail.com & I’ll see u @ #NICAR (1/10)

If you'll be at #NICAR26 in Indy, I'm doing a few sessions.

3/5 (Thurs) @ 11:30: Using data to find sources
3/6 (Fri) @ 10:15: Demo: The Gun Violence Data Hub
3/6 (Fri) @ 11:30: Connect with skeptical and disengaged audiences ... with data!

Hope to see ya there!
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

Ready to level up your election data analysis skills?

Join this hands-on #NICAR26 session designed for journalists and data pros who want faster, cleaner workflows.

You’ll learn through real-world data journalism examples from Eade Hemingway and Oliver Hawkins of the Financial Times.

When should journalists use AI and when shouldn’t we?

The #NICAR26 panel “How to Use AI Responsibly” brings together newsroom leaders to discuss ethics, disclosure and combining AI tools with human review.

Complex PDFs slowing you down?

“How to Get Data Out of Complex PDFs Using AI” is a hands-on session at #NICAR26 on extracting key info and vetting AI outputs to power strong reporting.

With:
Disha Raychaudhuri (Reuters)
Duy Nguyen (The New York Times)
Clare Farley (Reuters)

Interest in posts about the NICAR data journalism conference March 5-8? This Bluesky feed collects posts with either the #NICAR26 or #NICAR2026 hashtag - plus searching for "NICAR" without a hashtag
bsky.app/profile/smac...
(Created with @blueskyfeedcreator.com ) #DDJ
Reposting with hashtags! #NICAR26 #NICAR2026 Check out the start pack at bsky.app/starter-pack...

Alt text by gemma3:12b running on ollama: "Presentation: Running LLMs locally! Aarushee Sahejpel & Dhrumil Mehta discuss at NICAR 26 (Indianapolis, March 5-8). Thursday, 3:45-4:45pm. Featuring race track graphic & speaker headshots."
Just playing around with some NICAR-L archives:

Our March issue comes out Thursday. This month we're talking about:
• what it's like to start a #newsletter when you can't see the screen
• #NICAR26
• dealing with #trauma as a journalist
• and more! 

Are you excited? We're excited.
Working on some Jupyter notebooks for #NICAR. One of my favorite ways to write and think about code.

We’re going LIVE in 15 minutes! 

Join us for an Instagram Live AMA!

We’re talking:
✨ How we got into journalism
✨ What we actually do
✨ #NICAR26 + #IRE26
✨ Memberships, programming & projects

🕒 12 p.m. PT / 3 p.m. ET
📍 LIVE on IG @ire_nicar + @poynter_institute
[NICAR 2026 is a data journalism conference happening next week in Indianapolis #ddj ]

Browse, search, and filter all the NICAR 2026 posts on Bluesky R Shiny app collects all the posts with the #NICAR26 or #NICAR2026 hashtags
App: apps.machlis.com/shiny/nicar2...

#RShiny 
[Did this for Twitter years ago, now updated]

In this hands-on #NICAR26 session, you’ll learn how to run large language models like Llama, Mistral, and Gemma. 

This session is perfect for beginners. 

Led by Aarushi Sahejpal from American University and Dhrumil Mehta from Columbia University. Register for #NICAR26: https://bit.ly/4oDxQJH

Want to build a dynamic, data-driven voter guide for your local elections? 

At this hands-on #NICAR26 session, Adam Marton and Jerry Zremski from the University of Maryland will show you how the Local News Network creates its signature online voter guides using SvelteKit + Datasette.
The Equal Access Public Media chief of editorial @stacykess.bsky.social is getting ready for @ire.org’s #NICAR26…

The Help Desk will be at #NICAR26 in Indianapolis! 

Find us in the exhibitor area, where you can pick up swag, tell us about what’s working for your news organization or tell us about a challenge your newsroom is facing.
https://www.ire.org/training/conferences/nicar-2026/

Immigration data can feel overwhelming. 

At #NICAR26, “Using Immigration Data to Tell Stories in Your Community” breaks it down and shows you how to turn messy data into meaningful local stories.

Come ready to dig in.

I'm thrilled to be a fellow at the #NICAR26 data journalism conference this year!

I'll also be coaching a hands-on session on #RStats data analysis + plotting using #tidyverse packages. 📊 
Maybe I'll see you there! 👇🏽
schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

"First LLM Classifier" is soooold out! #NICAR26 is ready to rip.

Fret not. You can still hit the wait list. And we will be releasing an online textbook with the full script for anyone to play at home.

LEARN LIKE A BOSS! Are you a news leader attending #NICAR26 in Indy next week who could use some specialized, FREE @ire.org training? Register for our “Managing Investigators” master class (featuring tips for navigating AI)! And stick around for our manager networking session after the class! (1/2)

i'm so excited and terrified to announce that my lightning talk for #NICAR26 was accepted and that i'll give it next week in indianapolis. it will detail something i've struggled quietly with and kept largely private but am ready to talk more openly about. www.ire.org/2026/02/25/a...

New open GitHub repo from IRE/NICAR!

https://github.com/ireapps/nicar-2026-local-guide
For any and all who will be at @ire.org's NICAR this year, please come to these sessions about accessibility! #NICAR26

Speaking aside, I’m pumped to connect with friends new and old this year at #NICAR26. I’m also still on the hunt for a full-time job, so if you or someone you know is looking for a data/investigative journalist, editor, or something related, please don’t hesitate to shoot me a message! (4/4)

I am impossibly excited to be speaking at #NICAR26 in Indianapolis!

On Friday, I’ll be kicking things off with @stacykess.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social for “Accessibility Basics.” We’ll give you a crash course in implementing more accessible practices in your own newsroom! (1/4)

Are you going #NICAR26? Attend "Fun with Hypotheticals: Investigating Your Dubious Data Dilemmas in Real Time". 

Bring your silliest data question and watch journalists break down how they’d actually report it using real investigative methods. 

Submit your hypothetical:
https://bit.ly/4qTpUoE

Ooo just spotted on GitHub: Scraping Sports Data With R
"Three R notebooks with step by step instructions on how to scrape data when it's easy, when it's a little harder, and when it's the NCAA and is awful."
github.com/mattwaite/ni...
For a #NICAR26 #RStats workshop by @mattwaite.bsky.social
I'll be at #NICAR26 next week, and I am so excited to once again to be leading the "Building your first SvelteKit data app" hands-on demo. Now with more Svelte 5. But the same number of cats.

Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! 

Sotiris Sideris is an investigative data journalist and educator from Athens, Greece, and a Nieman Fellow at Harvard based in Cambridge, Massachusetts. 

He's looking forward to learning how journalists are actually applying AI in real-world investigative reporting.

Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows! 

Bella Davis is an Indigenous affairs reporter at New Mexico In Depth and a proud Yurok tribal member based in Albuquerque. Her reporting focuses on critical issues affecting Native communities across New Mexico.

Meet the #NICAR26 Fellows!

Jordan Gass-Pooré @jgasspoore.bsky.social is a podcast producer & investigative journalist based in NYC 

She is looking forward to sharpening her skills in incorporating data into audio investigations & analyzing global environmental datasets for local reporting.

Meet #NICAR26 Fellow Silvia Canelón, a data scientist and journalist based in Philadelphia. 

She is hoping to bring back accountability story ideas for Philly and sharpen her ability to create custom interactive data visualizations. 

Meet the rest of the #NICAR26 Fellows: https://bit.ly/4cAtujW

Meet your #NICAR26 Fellows!

Stacy Kess, Chief of Editorial at Equal Access Public Media, is gearing up for #NICAR26 the only way she knows how: with coffee. Lots of it.

Catch Stacy and her coffee-fueled data brilliance at #NICAR26!
This is like when I told other journalists "Anchorman" was 21 years old before my presentation at NICAR last year and they all made faces at me in reply.

Are you coming to the #NICAR26 conference? 

Join @amondry.bsky.social and me for a conversation about how to report on housing and homelessness challenges!
More info here: schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#... @ire.org

Anyone going to #NICAR26 in Indy next week: Swing by my Thursday 9 a.m. session, "AI Tools for Journalists". We'll focus on data and other multimedia tools. 

Two-hour, hands-on session. Good fun. Tools, exercises to take with you. Good fun.
Catch me at the #NICAR26 data journalism conference next week!

4/8 Next, pull in the schedule:

NICAR2026 <- rio::import("https://ire-nicar-conference-schedules.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/nicar-2026/nicar-2026-schedule.json")

Make a dataframe of all the speakers:

speakers <- NICAR2026$speakers

 And get their socials:

socials <- speakers$social

1/8 So you're excited to go to the @ire.org 2026 NICAR data journalism conference!

And you want to follow all the speakers online. This tutorial will show you how do this quickly with #Rstats and @bsky.app.

schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#/

author_display_name: Emily Hopkins is reporting for Mirror Indy
post_text: Can't believe #NICAR26 is next week! Excited to see Indy crawling with data nerds. 😎
So proud of our founder and chief of editorial @stacykess.bsky.social, one of the 19 fantastic #NICAR26 Fellows!
Thank you #NICAR for the skills that made this 330+ row Flourish monstrosity possible. @ire.org

We’re proud to share that IRE is sponsoring 19 fellowships for journalists attending #NICAR26 in Indianapolis on March 5–8.

All fellows meet IRE’s membership standards, engaging substantially in news gathering, production, research or journalism education. 

Read more here: https://bit.ly/4cAtujW

ireapps har nettopp åpnet repoet ireapps/nicar-2026-dining: https://github.com/ireapps/nicar-2026-dining

En guide til alle de beste spisestedene på NICAR 2026 i Indianapolis.

Inside:
- A Worldwide Virtual IRE Meetup
- NICAR26 updates
- $10K reporting grants
- Award nominations
- IRE26 early-bird deadline

Check your inbox.

Register now and secure your seat: 
https://www.ire.org/training/conferences/nicar-2026/

• practicing your alt text chops.

With @ire.org #NICAR26 on the brain (because I'm putting the polishing touch on the presentations), I want to remind you that you definitely want to be there for Accessibility Basics. Come for the data, stay for the digital accessibility-Star Wars tie-in.

schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...

1/

🤓 Coming to #NICAR26? Looking for things to do?

Join Scott Klein and me for a free dinner on Wed. night! OpenNews is hosting a discussion of our recent story on the state of open-source in journalism.

The full menu of community meals is at […]

Really looking forward to speaking at @ire.org's NICAR Conference next month. We'll be talking about better teams (my favorite) and generally working better with other humans (necessary, IMO). 

👯 Relationships are the most important piece

Will I see you there?

Heading to Indy for #NICAR26? 

Sign up for a 20-min one-on-one session with a manager or newsroom leader with expertise. 

#NICAR26 Office Hours will be held on Saturday, March 7 from 10:15-12:30 PM ET in Room 208: https://bit.ly/3MsiZEP

Sign up before Feb. 20.

If you're a data journalist using Python and you are going to be at NICAR, we are running an introduction to Polars workshop.

schedules.ire.org/nicar-2026/#...
bsky.app/profile/emil...

If you’re joining us for #NICAR26 in March and hoping to get (or give!) one-on-one guidance, the deadline to sign up for the mentorship program is TODAY, Friday, Feb. 13 at 11:59 P.M. ET. 

It's one of the most meaningful parts of the conference. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/4rJjGZc
My hesitancy to attend NICAR in Minneapolis next month is part of a wider trend of Canadians avoiding travel the US for multiple years: www.usatoday.com/story/travel...

Hey #NICAR26! We're putting together a hands-on session you all know you want and need called Implementing Accessibility. 

It focuses on Alt Text best practices, and how to do it for photos, graphics, maps, and more. We'll give you practice plus some goodies! 

#AltText @ire.org

Are you heading to @ire.org #NICAR26? Looking for a job?  Sign up for a 1-on-1 feedback or career advice session with a manager!

Bring your resume, a clip, or a career question and we'll match you with an expert. (Possibly me.) 

Sign up: forms.gle/o2mCuhWvBa4R.... We have about 50 slots left!

March is conference month! 

I'll be talking about #AccessibilityBasics and teaching how to implement #Accessibility at @ire.org's #NICAR26 in Indy. Then I'll head to Detroit to talk about #AccessibleCommuniction at #NTC26 (Nonprofit Tech Conference), representing @equalaccesspublicmedia.org.

It's now time to vote for your favorite #NICAR26 t-shirt designs! You have until 11:59 p.m. on Feb. 13 to vote. 

Click here to vote: https://bit.ly/4cli8A8

Voting for #NICAR26 Lightning Talks is now open!

Lightning Talks are fast, 5-minute presentations focused on practical skills, tools and techniques. 

Voting is open now and closes Feb. 20.

The selected talks will be presented Friday, March 6 at #NICAR26.

Have your say: https://bit.ly/4qrmZDa
Can’t wait to join @stacykess.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social to present #AccessibilityBasics and #ImplementingAccessibility at #NICAR26! If you’ll be there, come join us!!

By the way, NICAR is my favorite journalism conference of the year.

And it's not just all the data nerds and free coffee.

I swear.

(But the free coffee and being around a bunch of people who totally get me helps.)

It is less than a month until #NICAR26, and I'm headed back to Indianapolis to teach #AccessibilityBasics with my two favorite people @emiliaruzicka.bsky.social and @patrickmgarvin.bsky.social. But wait! There's more! Stick around for the new hands-on #ImplementingAccessibility session!

Have questions about NICAR26 or other upcoming IRE events? Join IRE President @hinklej.bsky.social, Executive Director @ddfonline.bsky.social and Training Director Laura Moscoso  

for virtual office hours this Wednesday, Feb. 11 at 1 PM ET.

Register now: https://bit.ly/4kq5aDl

Reporter Hashim Quraishi is preparing a big preview of #NICAR26.

And Akinyele Michael will have some great columns in store for you!

If you have news to send us for the March edition, or you know a source (or a source) for one of these articles, email editor@the-word.news.

3/

IRE Board President @hinklej.bsky.social explains why IRE’s 2026 conference season is so critical — and how NICAR26 (March 5–8 in Indianapolis) will help journalists sharpen their reporting, storytelling and data skills.

Learn more and sign up: https://bit.ly/4oDxQJH

Want to talk more about it? If you're attending the upcoming #NICAR26 conference in Indianapolis, you should join us for the OpenNews dinner we're sponsoring.

More details soon. DM me if you want in.

Your concerns are real, of course, Karen. There are no easy answers for safety issues. We do have lower rates for NICAR26 for unemployed members; email info@ire.org for details. If you can’t attend NICAR26, I hope you’ll consider attending AccessFest in October; same great training, all online.

Conference app chatbot built in R that:
- Answers schedule questions
- Includes both chatbot and searchable table
- One-click button filters table to see only sessions AI bot mentions
Code: github.com/smach/NICAR2...
App: smach-nicar2026-chatbot.share.connect.posit.cloud
#RStats #RShiny #NICAR26

Sorry for delay in replying, Karen. And about your situation. I wish everyone could be @NICAR26. It’s our homecoming; IRE’s first confab was in Indy in 1976. Like now, journalists were under attack. It’s so much worse. But we can’t let them stop us from holding the powerful to account.
